view.title: Validate persona scenario #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of running consolidated versus per-location reports, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the system's ability to generate or compare these reports. While the linked use case describes the scenario of a multi-location business, it does not include specific API responses or data that confirm the expected reporting behavior. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to conclude whether the requirement is satisfied.
